bsky.name: Jack Hopkins-The Original
bsky.text:
January. Jamie Raskin puts one question in writing to Bondi and Noem: How many pardoned January 6th rioters are on your payroll?
Simple question. 
DHS called the letter reckless. Disgusting. Unhinged.
Then refused to answer it.
Three adjectives and no number. That's not a denial.
